name: spreadx-matrix
description: Operate a SpreadX account from Codex — balance, orders, follow, and like/retweet/comment plans — via the spreadx MCP server, with a dry-run→confirm safety protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a SpreadX account: balance, orders, follow, like
interface.longDescription: Check your SpreadX balance and orders, and create follow / like-retweet-comment growth plans, through the spreadx MCP server. Every write is previewed (dry-run) and confirmed before it runs.
